build.message: Build completed successfully with expected bundle size warnings only

lint.message: Lint passed. Experimental API warnings are acceptable (ToggleGroupControl, ToggleGroupControlOption). No Archive-specific errors.

tested: Empty optional fields (no heading/eyebrow/buttons) - renders without errors
Light mode and dark mode variations
Different post types (post, resource, policy, team_member, testimonial)

testsRun.test: Dark mode resource card hover - btn-tertiary contrast
testsRun.observation: Card hovers to accent (neon-green), btn-tertiary text stays charcoal, excellent contrast

testsRun.test: Light mode resource card hover - btn-tertiary contrast
testsRun.observation: White card hovers to accent, btn-tertiary stays charcoal, no white-on-white issue

testsRun.test: Light mode policy card hover - btn-tertiary contrast
testsRun.observation: Same pattern as resource card - btn-tertiary maintains charcoal text on accent hover

darkModeToggle.verified: BlockControls toolbar button with shadow icon appears in editor, toggles darkMode attribute

accessibility.patternCompliance: N/A - Archive block uses standard semantic HTML (section, form, select, button) without specific WAI-ARIA patterns like tabs/carousel

observations: Section wrapper uses proper aria-labelledby linking to ThemeHeading ID
Form uses correct role='search' when displaySearch is true, role='form' otherwise
Select elements have proper labels via placeholder text and aria-label on parent
Button elements use aria-label for screen readers
Heading hierarchy follows h2 -> h3 pattern (ThemeHeading h2, card titles h3)
All filters (select dropdowns) are keyboard accessible
Clear All button is keyboard accessible
Filter tag pills are keyboard accessible
Search input and submit button are keyboard accessible
Per-page select is keyboard accessible
Card links are keyboard accessible
Dark mode: white text on charcoal pseudo-element background - excellent contrast
Light mode: charcoal text on off-white page background - excellent contrast
Resource/policy cards dark mode: white text on charcoal card - excellent contrast
Resource/policy cards light mode: charcoal text on white card - excellent contrast
Card hover state: charcoal text on accent (neon-green) - excellent contrast
btn-tertiary hover fix prevents white-on-white and cream-on-green contrast issues
Dropdown arrows: white in dark mode, charcoal in light mode - correct contrast
Pagination: dark mode uses white text/buttons, light mode uses charcoal

markupDuplication.observations: No responsive duplication detected. Archive uses single DOM structure with CSS-based responsive layout changes.

observations: Section wrapper: TSX uses useBlockProps with cn() for conditional classes, PHP uses theme_block_props(class_name())
darkMode conditional: TSX 'dark bg-transparent!': attributes.darkMode, PHP 'dark bg-transparent!' => $darkMode
data-dark-mode attribute: PHP has data-dark-mode="1" or "0", TSX doesn't output this (editor-only, not needed)
Inner wrapper div: Both use conditional dark mode pseudo-element classes
ThemeHeading: TSX passes attributes directly, PHP uses get_template_part with array
Conditional rendering: PHP uses <?php if ( $condition ) : ?> pattern consistently
Section: 'archive py-gap-8' + conditional 'dark bg-transparent!' - synced
Container: 'container grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5' - synced
Inner wrapper: conditional dark mode pseudo-element classes - synced
data-pagination-mode attribute - synced
data-post-type attribute - synced

innerBlocks.reason: Archive block does not use inner blocks

variationsCovered: Blog archive - dark mode with all features
Blog archive - long content edge case

requirementsMet: darkMode boolean attribute added with default: true
BlockControls toolbar button for dark mode toggle (shadow icon)
Section className conditional: 'dark bg-transparent!' only when darkMode is true
Inner wrapper pseudo-element classes conditional on darkMode
data-dark-mode attribute on section for JS detection
card-resource.php: dark:bg-charcoal bg-white and dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10
card-policy.php: same conditional classes as resource card
Archive.css: btn-tertiary hover overrides for both light and dark modes
Archive.css: dropdown arrow color variants (white for dark, charcoal for light)
Archive.css: blog Load More button white-filled in dark mode
Archive.css: blog xl-desktop divider colors (white opacity for dark, charcoal opacity for light)
navigation.css: dark mode overrides for pagination (.dark .navigation)

issues.description: PHP template missing @var docblock for camelCase attribute variables
issues.details: The PHP template uses 8 camelCase variables from auto-extracted attributes: $blockVariation, $darkMode, $displayFilters, $displayPerPage, $displaySearch, $maxColumns, $paginationMode, $postsPerPage. Without a @var docblock, PHP_CodeSniffer will warn about camelCase naming (WordPress coding standards prefer snake_case). The docblock tells the linter these come from JavaScript block attributes.
issues.fix:
Add @var docblock after the opening comment block:

/**
 * Archive block template.
 *
 * Renders a filterable archive of posts from a configured post type
 * with taxonomy filtering, search, pagination, and per-page controls.
 *
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var string $anchor
 * @var string $blockVariation
 * @var string $eyebrow
 * @var string $heading
 * @var string $description
 * @var array $buttons
 * @var bool $displayFilters
 * @var bool $displaySearch
 * @var bool $displayPerPage
 * @var int $postsPerPage
 * @var int $maxColumns
 * @var string $paginationMode
 * @var bool $darkMode
 *
 * Also available:
 * @var string $children Inner blocks content
 * @var WP_Block $block Block instance
 */
